title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2025/0087 Land between 84 and 108 Ragged Hall Lane, Chiswell Green, St Albans, Hertfordshire, AL2 3NN
body: "Type of application:  Outline planning permission with all matters reserved  Applicant name:  Martin Holderness  Site address:  Land between 84 and 108 Ragged Hall Lane, Chiswell Green, St Albans, Hertfordshire, AL2 3NN  Description of proposed development:  Outline planning application (all matters reserved) for 7 serviced plots for self-build and custom housebuilding.  Case Officer:  Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure:   Written Representations  Key dates:      Date     Date application valid 20 March 2025   Date by when representations must be made 28 April 2025   Hearing date and venue NA   Target Decision 5 June 2025   Decision date 12 June 2025     Decision   Decision Notice and Statement of Reasons  (PDF, 161 KB, 11 pages)   Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 28 April 2025.  Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others. Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to  section62anonmajor@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to Section 62A Applications Team, Planning Inspectorate, 3rd Floor, Temple Quay House, 2 The Square, Temple Quay, Bristol, BS1 6PN  Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2025/0087 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least one week before the date of the hearing.   Application Plans and Documents     Cover letter  (PDF, 1.62 MB, 13 pages)  Planning application form  (PDF, 3.69 MB, 12 pages)  02 LPA comments on NPPF relating to appeal case 3345004 dated 03012025  (PDF, 822 KB, 8 pages)  3331451 appeal decision 28 to 74 Ragged Hall Lane 03052024  (PDF, 193 KB, 19 pages)  3345004 - Land between 84-108 Ragged Hall Lane, Chiswell Green Decision 200125  (PDF, 135 KB, 6 pages)  3349774 APPEAL DECISION Land between Bluebell Grange and Harkaway 060224  (PDF, 122 KB, 6 pages)  3351517 Appeal Decision relating to land east of Chirnside House January 2025 copy  (PDF, 109 KB, 6 pages)  5_2023_1300 28 to 74 RHL landscape response from Hertfordshire CC 11092023  (PDF, 316 KB, 4...
